## CGPA Calculator Project

This is a Java Maven project for calculating CGPA (Cumulative Grade Point Average).

### Project Overview
- **Language**: Java 25
- **Build Tool**: Maven
- **Main Package**: com.cgpa.calculator
- **Entry Point**: com.cgpa.calculator.Main

### Key Instructions
- Use Maven for building and running tasks
- JDK is located at: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.1.8-hotspot
- Run `mvn clean install` to build the project
- Run `mvn test` to execute unit tests
- Use `mvn compile` for compilation only

### Testing
- Unit tests are located in src/test/java
- Tests use JUnit 4.13.2
- Run tests with: `mvn test`

### Package Structure
- Main classes in: src/main/java/com/cgpa/calculator/
- Test classes in: src/test/java/com/cgpa/calculator/
